objective: Repair plain human-prompt routing from ACLI into canonical intake paths without redesigning OCS, PPP, Worker Lifecycle, Provider Runtime, or Replay Runtime.

routing_analysis.root_cause_before_repair: Plain human prompts did not reliably map to certified ACLI continuation routes.
routing_analysis.repair_scope: Human Prompt -> ACLI -> Canonical Intake Routing

before_routing_flow.development_prompt: Human -> ACLI -> DEFAULT_PROVIDER_ASSISTED_CONVERSATION or failed native intake
before_routing_flow.clarification_prompt: Human -> ACLI -> default/fallback path instead of OCS clarification
before_routing_flow.approval_prompt: Human -> ACLI -> default/fallback path instead of OCS approval boundary
before_routing_flow.domain_prompt: Human -> ACLI -> unknown-domain clarification or no proposal artifact

after_routing_flow.development_prompt: Human -> ACLI -> Universal Intake -> Native Development Intake -> PPP -> Authorization -> Worker -> Provider -> Validation -> Replay
after_routing_flow.clarification_prompt: Human -> ACLI -> Universal Intake -> OCS Intake -> Clarification Required
after_routing_flow.approval_prompt: Human -> ACLI -> Universal Intake -> OCS Intake -> Approval Required
after_routing_flow.domain_prompt: Human -> ACLI -> Universal Intake -> Domain Intake -> DOMAIN_PROPOSAL_CREATED -> Approval Boundary

clarification_prompt.prompt: Create a reporting system suitable for my business

approval_prompt.prompt: Deploy a production system affecting external users

domain_prompt.prompt: Create a new HR evaluation domain
